betterquesting:10.desc:8:
§6Accelerator Ion Source§f

§aFuel injector for the accelerator multiblock.§f

The §bAccelerator Ion Source§f (qmd:accelerator_source) is a port block that injects fuel canisters (e.g. §bHydrogen Canisters§f) into an accelerator multiblock. Placed at one end of the center beamline, pointing inward.

§6Recipe Ingredients§f:
§b•§f §bAdvanced Plating§f (nuclearcraft)
§b•§f §bAccelerator Casing§f (qmd)

§6What It Makes§f:
§b•§f §bAccelerator Laser Ion Source§f (qmd)

§6Key Component Materials (depth-2)§f:
§b•§f §bCopper Coil§f (hbm)
§b•§f §bSteel Anvil§f (hbm)
§b•§f §bRedstone§f
§b•§f §bTough Alloy Ingot§f
§b•§f §bEmerald§f
§b•§f §bUranium-235§f

§6Validation Rules§f:
§b•§f LinearAcceleratorLogic validates that one end has an Ion Source + the other a Beam Port
§b•§f Without an Ion Source, the multiblock will not form (validation error: "no_source")
§b•§f Source: lach_01298.qmd.accelerator.LinearAcceleratorLogic, BeamDiverterLogic, BeamSplitterLogic, DeceleratorLogic
